title: Fabric New Creative Icons
description: Replaces the creative arrow buttons for Fabric with a the new style
body:
A simple resource pack to replace the creative inventory arrow buttons with the new style, modified to fit the old size. For people that like the new style but play on older versions.

![The inventory buttons with the resource pack installed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3e31874481d457de0fd7cf4efcd83a889235920.png)
